Headline: #71 71st/South Shore Temporary Southbound Reroute near 75th/Exchange
ShortDescription: Southbound  71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via Exchange, 76th, Yates and 75th: due to, street blockage near 75th/Exchange.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound  #71 71st/South Shore buses are temporarily rerouted via Exchange, 76th, Yates and 75th: due to, street blockage near 75th/Exchange.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #70 Division | Temporary Reroute at Division/Kostner
ShortDescription: 70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted via Division, Kostner, Augusta, Cicero and Division due to, street blockage near Division/Kostner.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted via Division, Kostner, Augusta, Cicero and Division due to, street blockage near Division/Kostner.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #75 74th/75th Temporary Reroute near 75th/Exchange
ShortDescription: #75 74th/75th Buses temporarily rerouted in both direction due street blockage near 75th/Exchange.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#75 74th/75th Buses temporarily rerouted in both direction due street blockage near 75th/Exchange.

Eastbound buses buses 75th, Exchange, 76th and South Shore then resume their normal route. 

Westbound buses 75th, Exchange, 73rd, Yates and 75th then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
